subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted to the Kingdom of God! Thy letter hath arrived from Germany. Thou hadst praised the gatherings in Stuttgart
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منجذب ملکوت الله نامه شما از آلمان رسید ستایش از محافل استوتگارت نموده
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @love of God
